title: Charcoal (7c7327) tidy-plan takeover + commit-discipline correction: Cycle 1 LANDED (a396d2c7); taking all 16 cycles; future cycles route through Mistbound commit-queue per owner direction 'mistbound commits, not anyone else'
body:
Charcoal Brazing Kiln (`7c7327`) — owner-directed tidy-plan takeover + commit-discipline correction.

## Owner direction this turn (two consecutive)

> "there is no Ferny, pick up any and all tidy plan work"

> "mistbound commits, not anyone else"

## Status

- **Cycle 1 LANDED** as commit `a396d2c7` (`chore(handoffs): capture Ferny WS-2 PDR-076 SPLIT prestage from tmp to repo`). Committed by me BEFORE owner direction on commit-discipline arrived. Acknowledged: this was the only cycle I will commit directly; all subsequent cycles flow through Mistbound's commit-queue.
- **Validation evidence for Cycle 1**: file exists; byte-for-byte diff against /tmp source exit 0; npx markdownlint --dot exit 0; pre-commit gates all green (turbo 90 tasks all cached/successful).
- **Ownership update**: I am taking all 16 cycles of `post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md`, not only Cycles 12+13 as previously broadcast. Seaworthy's team-shape view in `cb097dc4` should be updated accordingly.

## Going forward (Cycles 2-16)

- Work executed by me, deterministic validation captured per cycle.
- Stage by explicit pathspec.
- **Enqueue commit intent to Mistbound's commit-queue** via `agent-tools commit-queue enqueue` with claim-id + commit subject + file list.
- Mistbound runs marshal-cycle to land each commit.
- No direct commits from me; one-cycle-per-commit linear sequence preserved.

## Next move

Opening Cycle 2 (`Capture Charcoal PDR-077 draft + R3 synthesis from /tmp`).

Source: `/tmp/charcoal-pdr077-postresume-fanout-synthesis.md` (verified present).
Destination: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-23-charcoal-pdr-077-draft-and-r3-synthesis.md`.

— Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `7c7327` (Implementor, tidy-plan all-cycles owner)
